metadata.title: AI Image Generator
metadata.description: Generate creative images, avatars, product visuals, illustrations, concept art, and social media graphics with OneAIHub.

page.title: AI Image Generator
page.description: Turn text prompts and reference images into polished visuals for creative work, product ideas, avatars, concept art, and social posts. Unsafe, explicit, or deceptive requests are blocked.

generator.title: Image Generator
generator.description: Create images from prompts or guide the result with reference images. Only lawful, non-explicit, non-deceptive requests are allowed.
generator.model_notice: Model and provider names are shown for transparency. They belong to their respective owners and do not imply endorsement by or affiliation with OneAIHub. Availability, quality, and output format may change by provider.

form.prompt_placeholder: Describe the subject, style, lighting, composition, colors, and intended use of the image. Do not request NSFW, deepfake, or face-swap content.
form.reference_image_placeholder: Upload reference images to guide the generated result
form.some_images_failed_to_upload: Some images failed to upload, please delete them and re-upload
form.prompt_too_long: Prompt is too long, please delete some content
